diagnosis: Default count of 1000 packets at ~25 pkt/s actual rate takes ~40s, exceeding the 30s timeout; reducing default to 500 brings expected runtime to ~20s

files_changed.description: Reduced default count for icmp-flood from 1000 to 500 so the attack completes in ~20s well within the 30s timeout

notes: mag/registry.py is a pure Python config file loaded at runtime inside the container — no Docker image rebuild is needed; the container just needs to re-run the attack with the updated default.
